where.if: AND ( M.MEMBER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR TO_CHAR(BC.BOARD_NO) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR NVL(RT.TYPE_NAME, '') LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR NVL(CR.REPORT_REASON, '') LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR NVL(BC.COMMENT_CONTENT, '') LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMENT_REPORT CR JOIN MEMBER M ON CR.REPORTER_MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO JOIN BOARD_COMMENT BC ON CR.COMMENT_ID = BC.COMMENT_ID LEFT JOIN REPORT_TYPE RT ON CR.REPORT_TYPE_ID = RT.REPORT_TYPE_ID

SELECT CR.REPORT_ID, CR.REPORTER_MEMBER_NO, CR.COMMENT_ID, CR.REPORT_TYPE_ID, CR.REPORT_REASON, TO_CHAR(CR.REPORT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REPORT_DATE, CR.REPORT_PROCESS_YN,
M.MEMBER_ID AS REPORTER_ID, BC.BOARD_NO, NVL(RT.TYPE_NAME, '기타') AS TYPE_NAME, BC.COMMENT_CONTENT,
CASE WHEN CR.REPORT_PROCESS_YN = 'Y' THEN 'DONE' ELSE 'PENDING' END AS REPORT_STATUS,
CASE WHEN CR.REPORT_PROCESS_YN = 'Y' THEN '처리 완료' ELSE '처리 대기' END AS PROCESS_LABEL FROM COMMENT_REPORT CR JOIN MEMBER M ON CR.REPORTER_MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO JOIN BOARD_COMMENT BC ON CR.COMMENT_ID = BC.COMMENT_ID LEFT JOIN REPORT_TYPE RT ON CR.REPORT_TYPE_ID = RT.REPORT_TYPE_ID
ORDER BY CR.REPORT_ID DESC

SELECT CR.REPORT_ID, CR.REPORTER_MEMBER_NO, CR.COMMENT_ID, CR.REPORT_TYPE_ID, CR.REPORT_REASON, TO_CHAR(CR.REPORT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REPORT_DATE, CR.REPORT_PROCESS_YN,
M.MEMBER_ID AS REPORTER_ID, BC.BOARD_NO, NVL(RT.TYPE_NAME, '기타') AS TYPE_NAME, BC.COMMENT_CONTENT,
CASE WHEN CR.REPORT_PROCESS_YN = 'Y' THEN 'DONE' ELSE 'PENDING' END AS REPORT_STATUS,
CASE WHEN CR.REPORT_PROCESS_YN = 'Y' THEN '처리 완료' ELSE '처리 대기' END AS PROCESS_LABEL FROM COMMENT_REPORT CR JOIN MEMBER M ON CR.REPORTER_MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO JOIN BOARD_COMMENT BC ON CR.COMMENT_ID = BC.COMMENT_ID LEFT JOIN REPORT_TYPE RT ON CR.REPORT_TYPE_ID = RT.REPORT_TYPE_ID WHERE CR.REPORT_ID = #{reportId}
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMENT_REPORT SET REPORT_PROCESS_YN = 'Y' WHERE REPORT_ID = #{reportId} AND REPORT_PROCESS_YN = 'N'

UPDATE COMMENT_REPORT SET REPORT_PROCESS_YN = 'Y' WHERE REPORT_ID IN
#{id}
UPDATE BOARD_COMMENT SET COMMENT_ACTIVE_YN = 'N' WHERE COMMENT_ID = ( SELECT COMMENT_ID FROM COMMENT_REPORT WHERE REPORT_ID = #{reportId} ) AND COMMENT_ACTIVE_YN = 'Y'
